claims.description:
claims is the decoded token payload. For JWT, this contains the
standard claims (iss, sub, aud, exp, iat, jti) plus custom claims.
For macaroons, this lists the caveats. The shape is backend-dependent
and should be treated as opaque diagnostic data.

token.description:
The encoded token string. JWT tokens are signed JWS in compact
serialization (header.payload.signature). Macaroons are base64-encoded
binary blobs.

token.title: Token represents a short-lived derived token (JWT or Macaroon)
